sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section I, List of Answers on Topics 24:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section I, List of Answers on Topics 24:1
items.html: Malchut of Ein Sof regarded the equivalence of form with her Maker as embellishment, which could only be achieved by the creation of the worlds. This is why she restricted herself. (Inner Light, Part 1, Chap 1, item 40 and Part 1, Chap 1, item 90)
